title: corybas undulatus
intro: Corybas undulatus, also known as the undulating helmet orchid, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Corybas undulatus is often prepared as a tea or tincture by herbalists, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
